setting.name: allow_multiple_claims
setting.description: When enabled, multiple VAEs may claim the same article simultaneously. The handling editor then selects one to confirm. When disabled, only one VAE may claim an article at a time.

setting.name: vae_claim_notification
setting.description: Email sent to journal editors when a VAE claims an article.

value.default:
Dear Editor,

{{ claim.claimed_by.full_name }} has claimed article #{{ claim.article.pk }}: {{ claim.article.title }}.

{% if claim.notes %}

Notes from the VAE: {{ claim.notes }}

{% endif %}

Review and confirm claims: {% journal_url 'vae_article' claim.article.pk %}

Regards,
{{ request.journal.name }}

setting.name: vae_withdrawn_notification
setting.description: Email sent to journal editors when a VAE withdraws their claim.

value.default:
Dear Editor,

{{ claim.claimed_by.full_name }} has withdrawn their claim on article #{{ claim.article.pk }}: {{ claim.article.title }}.

Review remaining claims: {% journal_url 'vae_article' claim.article.pk %}

Regards,
{{ request.journal.name }}

setting.name: vae_confirmed_notification
setting.description: Email sent to the VAE when their claim is confirmed by an editor.

value.default:
Dear {{ claim.claimed_by.full_name }},

Your claim on article #{{ claim.article.pk }}: {{ claim.article.title }} has been confirmed. You have been assigned as section editor for this article.

Regards,
{{ request.journal.name }}

setting.name: vae_new_article_notification
setting.description: Email sent to all VAEs in the pool when a new article is available for claiming.

value.default:
Dear {{ recipient.full_name }},

A new preprint is available for claiming as Handling Editor: {{ article.title }}.

View and claim the article: {% journal_url 'vae_article' article.pk %}

Regards,
{{ request.journal.name }}

setting.name: vae_rejected_notification
setting.description: Email sent to the VAE when their claim is rejected by an editor.

value.default:
Dear {{ claim.claimed_by.full_name }},

Your claim on article #{{ claim.article.pk }}: {{ claim.article.title }} has not been taken forward at this time.

Regards,
{{ request.journal.name }}
